hero.role: Frontend Developer · CS Student · Persian NLP
hero.description: I craft immersive, high-performance interfaces where design, language, and engineering meet. From React experiences to 3D motion and multilingual UI, I build digital work that feels thoughtful and alive.
hero.card.title: Modern products with personality
about.title: About
about.text: I am a CS student and frontend developer with a deep interest in Persian NLP. I build modern, accessible web applications and explore the intersection of heritage scripts and contemporary tooling. My work spans from React/3D engineering to ParsBERT sentiment lexicons.
skills.title: Skills
projects.title: Projects
projects.voteria.title: Voteria
projects.voteria.desc: Reddit-inspired community discussion platform. Real-time state management with Zustand, collaborative Git workflow.
projects.lexicon.title: Persian Sentiment Lexicon
projects.lexicon.desc: ParsBERT/MLM-based sentiment lexicon generation from Digikala reviews, with POS-aware template selection.
projects.hooshtan.title: Hooshtan Fit
projects.hooshtan.desc: Android app via Capacitor + MediaPipe pose detection. Cross-platform mobile and native-bridge debugging.
projects.icpc.title: ICPC Contest Site
projects.icpc.desc: Astro 7 + React islands architecture. Evaluating framework tradeoffs for high-performance static sites.
contact.title: Contact
contact.text: I'm always open to discussing new projects, creative ideas or opportunities to be part of your visions.
